data.title: BTC plunges under $69K with the US losing 92K jobs in February. Crypto shaken as economy faces uncertainty.
data.description: In the past 24 hours, Bitcoin's value has dropped by 5% as the United States reported a loss of 92,000 jobs in February. This news has sent shockwaves through the cryptocurrency markets, contributing to increased economic instability.

data.title: Surgical Staplers Market to Reach USD 10.3 Billion by 2032; Maximize Market Research Highlights 7.5% CAGR Driven by Robotic-Assisted Surgery and Advanced Wound Closure Innovation
data.description: In Pune, India, on March 6, 2026, it was reported that the Surgical Staplers Market has evolved into a high-precision digital ecosystem due to the increasing complexity of surgeries. The market, valued at USD 6.14 billion in 2025, has shifted from being a basic mechanical commodity to a sophisticated technological solution for wound closure.

data.title: ASHFORD ANNOUNCES PLANNED RETIREMENT OF CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER DERIC EUBANKS
data.description: Dallas, March 6, 2026 - Today, Ashford Inc. revealed that Deric Eubanks, the Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, will retire in June after dedicating 23 years to the Company and its predecessor. Mr. Eubanks will relinquish his role as CFO at that time.

data.title: In HelloNation, Auto Repair Expert David Ortez Demystifies Oil Changes
data.description: In St. George, Utah, a recent article by HelloNation featuring David Ortez from St George Auto Repair debunks the misconception that drivers need an oil change every 3,000 miles. The article addresses the widespread belief and provides clarification on oil change intervals in modern vehicles. It emphasizes the importance of understanding manufacturer guidelines rather than sticking to outdated practices. This piece aims to educate drivers on proper maintenance, ensuring they follow recommendations that are beneficial for their vehicles.

data.title: Quantum Metric Announces 2026 CPD Signal Award Winners
data.description: Multiple enterprise brands have been acknowledged for their utilization of real-time, AI-powered data to enhance digital interactions and expedite business outcomes. The accolades were announced in Colorado Springs, Colo., on March 6, 2026. Quantum Metric, a prominent provider of proactive digital analytics solutions for enterprises, expressed pride in showcasing the innovative strategies employed by these brands.

data.title: Why Is Jiuzi Holdings Stock Surging Today?
data.description: Jiuzi Holdings (NASDAQ: JZXN) saw an increase in its shares on Friday after securing an $80 million investment from a strategic investor. This investment is expected to boost the company's financial flexibility and operational capabilities, especially as it enters the crypto asset space. The strategic investor will initially purchase 40 million ordinary shares at $2 per share, providing a significant cash infusion for Jiuzi. Furthermore, the agreement paves the way for a second phase involving crypto contributions to optimize the company's treasury structure and risk exposure.This development follows Jiuzi Holdings' recent strategic deal with a global digital asset investor, which entailed the transfer of 10,000 Bitcoin to the company in exchange for equity valued at around $1 billion. This news has propelled JZXN stock upwards as broader markets simultaneously experienced a slight downturn.
